emulator_prep.title: Prepare for the Emulator fight — clear both Annihilator and Ignis before attempting the final Cataclysm boss

subtitle.text: Ignis burns. The Annihilator destroys. Both are required before the Emulator. The chain has two endings.

description: ▸ The Cataclysm chain has a fork at Tier 2.
The Annihilator is the void path.
Both must be cleared before the Emulator.
└ Void zones: deal damage AND pull inward
└ Armor priority: high Protection — void damage
└ No vanilla resistance to void damage
└ Best defense: high HP + Regeneration beacon
└ Totems of Undying: carry 2 for the Annihilator
Death from void zone is instant — no second chance
└ ISS Abjuration: Magic Shield absorbs first void hit
└ Clear Ignis first (fire resistance helps Ignis fight)
└ Both fights can be done in one session
if you manage resources between arenas
▸ The Annihilator was created to remove things
It has no preference about what should not exist.
You are in that category by definition.
▶ Complete the dual clear — ready for Emulator [check]
◇ The Emulator fight requires both Ignis and Annihilator
to be cleared. Do not attempt Emulator with
either boss alive — the Emulator copies their patterns.
